purpose: Documents the master's monitoring and statusing protocol: how it reads progress files to derive overall state, when to append to logs.json, how to surface deviations, and the user-facing status reports it produces during long-running swarms. Defines the cadence and shape of status updates the master streams to the chat.
gotchas: Stat counters are derived, not stored -- the master never maintains its own counts
Reading progress files mid-write requires the same retry pattern the server uses
patterns: Derived state from progress file scans rather than maintained counters
conventions: Status snapshots include wave-level rollups plus per-agent stage info
